notes: Full savory dinner menu captured (Shareables, Entrées). Steak and oyster items carry tiered pricing -> base price in price_cents, tiers in price_note. The dessert list and full cocktail/wine list sit on a separate /drink page and were not captured here (homepage references Strawberry Old Fashioned and Garden Gimlet cocktails); beverages left empty. High-end French room; several luxury/market items (seafood tower, caviar, tomahawk for two).

dishes.name: PNW Seafood Tower
dishes.description: Dozen oysters, ½ Dungeness crab, jumbo poached cocktail prawns, salmon tartare, foraged ocean salad, rotating crudo, seasonal accompaniments.
dishes.price_note: for the table; add ½ crab +30, 1oz Ossetra caviar +60

dishes.name: Bread Service
dishes.description: Seasonal butter, B&B onions.

dishes.name: Leafy Greens Salad
dishes.description: White cheddar, toasted almonds, radish, champagne vinaigrette.

dishes.name: Beet Salad
dishes.description: Compressed pears, toasted walnuts, watercress, cotija, pickled yellow beets.

dishes.name: The Farm Plate
dishes.description: Featuring Washington farmed delights.

dishes.name: French Onion Soup
dishes.description: Torn croutons, Gran Cru Gruyère.

dishes.name: Confit Fennel
dishes.description: Roasted radish, French curry squash, pistachios.

dishes.name: Beef Tartare
dishes.description: Pickled mustard seeds, quail egg, shallots, cornichon, pickled crudité, crostini.

dishes.name: Grilled Octopus
dishes.description: Heirloom & navy beans, shishito peppers, pickled peppers, citrus jam, crispy garlic.

dishes.name: Local Oysters
dishes.description: Seasonal accompaniments.

dishes.name: Crispy Sweetbreads
dishes.description: Escarole, spiced honey mustard cream, pickled mustard seeds.

dishes.name: Local Roasted Bone Marrow
dishes.description: Roasted garlic, gremolata, grilled bread.

dishes.name: Le Coin Caviar Service
dishes.description: 1 ounce of Ossetra sturgeon caviar, seasonal accompaniments.

dishes.name: Trofie Pasta
dishes.description: Braised Oregon lamb, tomato ragu, sheep cheese.

dishes.name: Seared Sablefish
dishes.description: Mushrooms a la Grecque, roasted butternut squash, sunchoke purée, sunchoke chips.

dishes.name: Le Coin Steak
dishes.description: Le Coin frites, maître d' butter, bordelaise or potato purée, foraged mushrooms, smoked onions, broccolini, demi.
dishes.price_note: New York 57 / beef tenderloin 67 / Washington wagyu du jour 75

dishes.name: Tomahawk Steak for Two
dishes.description: Potato purée, foraged mushrooms, smoked onions, broccolini, demi. Add Le Coin Style (marinated prawns & bone marrow) +29.

dishes.name: Lamb Loin
dishes.description: Root vegetable pavé, caramelized figs, braised radicchio, fresh horseradish, carrot soubise.

dishes.name: Crispy Half Chicken
dishes.description: Roasted foraged mushrooms, cherry tomatoes, braised shallots, herb and pickles salad.

dishes.name: Le Coin Burger
dishes.description: Caramelized onion & mimolette fondue, cured tomato, herb aioli, hand cut frites, brioche bun.
dishes.price_note: add 2oz foie gras torchon +18, 3¼oz seared foie gras +37
